$comment: Scoped TS config for the apps/web-ui scripts (currently just emit-tokens-css.ts). Bun runs the script directly with full ES2022 + Node-API support; this config only exists so editors and svelte-check stop complaining about node:fs imports and Object.entries / Array.prototype.at when the file is open. The svelte-only consumers of apps/web-ui get their own tsconfig in apps/web.
